notes: Test audio files not committed (too large). Place samples in evals/files/ to run.

evals.prompt: transcribe this meeting recording at inbox/short-sync.m4a. Language: en, 2 speakers, topic: sprint planning, terms: Jira, Confluence.
evals.expected_output: A markdown transcript with speaker labels, timestamps, and metadata header in outbox/short-sync-*/transcript.md.
assertions: Transcript contains bold speaker labels (** pattern)
Timestamps are present and monotonically increasing
Metadata header includes source, language, and speakers fields
No hallucination blacklist phrases appear in output (e.g. 'Thanks for watching', 'Субтитры')
Agent asked intake questions before transcribing

evals.prompt: process this recording inbox/long-workshop.mp4. Language: ru, 3 speakers, topic: backend architecture, terms: NestJS, Fastify, Postgres, Render.
evals.expected_output: A chunked transcription producing a merged and cleaned transcript with 3 named speakers.
assertions: prep_audio.py was invoked and produced manifest.json
Multiple chunks were transcribed (manifest shows n_chunks > 1)
A cleanup pass was performed (polished.json exists or transcript reflects merged content)
Final transcript.md has 3 distinct speaker labels
No fabricated content from prompt terms appearing in turns where topic wasn't discussed

evals.prompt: I have a Zoom recording with a VTT subtitle file. Process inbox/zoom-call.mp4 and inbox/zoom-call.vtt. Language: en, 2 speakers, topic: onboarding review.
evals.expected_output: Agent assesses VTT quality at Gate 1, recommends a path (VTT-only or re-transcribe), and produces transcript.md.
assertions: parse_vtt.py was invoked on the VTT file
Agent presented a VTT quality assessment to the user
Agent asked user to confirm VTT outcome at Gate 1
If VTT was usable, no API transcription call was made
